name: changelog-scribe
must_detect_signals: a skills/<name>/SKILL.md file exists (skill package layout)
SKILL.md has YAML frontmatter with both `name` and `description`
the description is trigger-style (states WHEN to use, not what it does)
progressive disclosure via a references/ directory beside SKILL.md
no compiled binary or importable package — it ships as Markdown
expected_visual: no ASCII banner required; lead with the trigger/when-to-use and a concrete before/after example
notes: readmedaddy's own archetype. README must surface the activation triggers and an install-into-skills-dir quickstart; G1 (hook/triggers), G4 (examples), and G8 (skill conventions) carry the most weight.
